title: State Vaccination Requirements | Vaccines & Immunizations | CDC
text:
compiled in 2005 and most recently updated in November 2014. 
Immunization requirements, by disease Lists vaccine-preventable diseases, and then shows state mandates (prenatal, daycare, childcare, kindergarten, elementary, secondary, K-12, colleges and universities, long-term care facilities) on immunization requirements Immunization Action Coalition (IAC)
